title: SurfaceSpec
description: Declarative binding of a connector tool's output shape onto a generic archetype renderer's slots. Zero side-effectful members: no handlers, no free-form URLs (only typed url_path fields the host sanitises), no templates, no code. This is the injection-blast-radius guarantee (generative-UI plan D9).

spec_version.description: Schema contract version. Frozen at 1; a bump is an amendment to PRD-01.

title_path.description: Dot-path to the surface headline in the tool output.

subtitle_path.description: Optional dot-path to a secondary line under the title.

fields.description: Label/value pairs for record | message | doc archetypes.

columns.description: Column definitions for table | board archetypes.

items_path.description: Dot-path to the array root for table | board | timeline archetypes.

group_by_path.description: Dot-path used to bucket board lanes.

archetype.description: The render family this spec binds to. Unknown values render as the tier-3 generic fallback rather than an error.

format.description: Presentation hint the renderer applies to a value. Purely visual; never fetches or executes.

align.description: Horizontal alignment for a table/board column.

dotPath.description: A dotted accessor into the payload: identifier segments and array indices only (a.b.0.c). No expressions, functions, brackets, or code.

source.description: The connector server + tool whose output shape this spec maps.

link.description: A single outbound link. url_path resolves into payload data and is host-sanitised at render; there are no free-form URLs.
